options.content:
## Прямые запросы к ClickHouse

Панели используют дatasource **`clickhouse-siem`**. Бизнес-данные — **`siem.events`**; нагрузка и задержки — **`system.query_log`** (должен быть включён в конфигурации сервера).

Пустые таблицы — выполните **`bootstrap_clickhouse.sh`** или **Fill All Data**.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS t, count() AS events FROM siem.events WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT toString(source_type) AS source_type, count() AS cnt FROM siem.events WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY source_type ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: system.query_log: запросов / мин
panels.description: Агрегат по query_log для оценки нагрузки на CH.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(event_time) AS t, count() AS queries FROM system.query_log WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
SELECT toStartOfMinute(event_time) AS t, avg(query_duration_ms) AS avg_ms FROM system.query_log WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND query_duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
